            print(f"  Row {i}, col {j}: b")
            break

action(['LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT'])
</parameter>
</function>

# Let me check the current player position and try moving LEFT then DOWN

    for j, c in enumerate(row):
        if c == 'b':
            print(f"  Row {i}, col {j}: b")
            break

# Try moving LEFT 5 times to get back to top-left, then DOWN
action(['LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT'])
